<script type="text/javascript">
// Scroll behavior: add white bg on scroll
document.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
    const header = document.getElementById('mainHeader');
    const gradient = document.getElementById('headerGradient');
    const logo = header.querySelector('.header-logo');
    const links = header.querySelectorAll('.header-link');
    const menuBtn = document.getElementById('mobileMenuBtn');
    
    if (window.scrollY > 80) {
        header.classList.add('bg-white', 'shadow-sm');
        gradient.classList.add('opacity-0');
        logo.style.filter = '';
        links.forEach(l => { l.classList.remove('text-white'); l.classList.add('text-dark'); });
        if (menuBtn) { menuBtn.classList.remove('text-white'); menuBtn.classList.add('text-dark'); }
    } else {
        header.classList.remove('bg-white', 'shadow-sm');
        gradient.classList.remove('opacity-0');
        logo.style.filter = 'brightness(0) invert(1)';
        links.forEach(l => { l.classList.add('text-white'); l.classList.remove('text-dark'); });
        if (menuBtn) { menuBtn.classList.add('text-white'); menuBtn.classList.remove('text-dark'); }
    }
});
</script>
